action_set_definitions.name: scan_dock_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the containers currently on the dock to retrieve detailed metadata including weight, type, variant, and specific route assignments.

action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current physical state of the ship, including total weight capacity and current stability metrics.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_dock_materials
action_set_definitions.description: Lists available friction-enhancing materials on the dock and their verified friction coefficients (μ).

action_set_definitions.name: get_deck_grid_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current occupancy status of all deck grid coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_stability_impact
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the result of placing a specific container at a specific coordinate to predict the final ship stability and weight.

container_id.description: The ID of the container to be loaded.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_loading_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the physical loading of a container onto the ship using a specified friction material at a specific coordinate.

container_id.description: The ID of the container to load.

material_id.description: The ID of the friction material to apply.

state_description.ship_id: Unique identifier for the vessel being loaded.
state_description.max_weight_capacity: The maximum total weight the ship can safely carry in metric tons.
state_description.current_total_weight: The current sum of weights of all loaded containers.
state_description.stability_index: A calculated value (0.0 to 1.0) representing the ship's balance. 1.0 is perfectly balanced.
state_description.containers_on_dock: A list of container objects currently waiting to be loaded, each with an id, weight, and type.
state_description.deck_layout: A mapping of grid coordinates (e.g., 'A1', 'B2') to container IDs currently placed on the ship.
